title: Aetheria's Skyblock Mod
description: A feature-rich Quality of Life mod for Fakepixel Skyblock, made from scratch and formerly known as Just Enough Fakepixel (JEF).
body:
Aetheria's Skyblock Mod

A feature-rich Quality of Life mod for Fakepixel Skyblock, made from scratch and formerly known as Just Enough Fakepixel (JEF).

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1479556885769093192?style=flat-square&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/4zKq2RkSZS) [![GitHub Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/aetheria-org/Aetheria/total?style=flat-square&logo=github&logoColor=white&label=Downloads&color=181717)](https://github.com/aetheria-org/Aetheria/releases) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/aetheriamod?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/mod/aetheriamod) [![Made with Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Made%20With-Java-ED8B00?style=flat-square&logo=openjdk&logoColor=white)](https://www.java.com) [![GitHub Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/aetheria-org/Aetheria?style=flat-square&logo=github&logoColor=white&label=Stars&color=181717)](https://github.com/aetheria-org/Aetheria/stargazers)
Download Aetheria's Skyblock Mod from your preferred platform:
   
# Features Aetheria is a feature-rich Quality-of-Life mod for Fakepixel Skyblock, which includes but is not limited to: - **Storage Overlay** -- manage your inventories with a custom overlay, with multiple themes and jump-to-active support - **Item List & Recipe Viewer** -- browse every SkyBlock item and view crafting recipes in-game - **Custom Scoreboard** -- fully configurable sidebar with custom lines, colors, ordering, and drag-to-reorder - **Diana Tracking** -- tracks burrows, playtime, mob rates, and loot with live HUD overlays - **Dungeon Tools** -- run timers, end-of-run stats, boss highlights, blood mob highlight, and a CS:GO-style chest opening animation - **Chat Tools** -- filters, compacting, timestamps, chat heads, copy, and animated messages - **Mining Overlays** -- powder tracker, pristine tracker, Fetchur overlay, commission highlights, and Pickobulus preview - **Fishing** -- trophy fish tracker and fishing timer - **Farming** -- mouse lock and BPS overlay - **Waypoints** -- ordered waypoints with auto-advance and a GUI manager - **Profile Viewer** -- `/pv [username]` to view SkyBlock stats in-game via SkyAtlas - **Capes** -- equip and display custom capes visible to other Aetheria users - **And much more** -- enchant parser, slot binds, item cooldowns, party commands, sign calculator, and dozens of other QoL improvements A full list of features can be found [here](https://github.com/aetheria-org/Aetheria/blob/main/docs/FEATURES.md). # Contributing to the project A full comprehensive guide for contribution and compiling the mod yourself can be found [here](https://github.com/aetheria-org/Aetheria/blob/main/docs/CONTRIBUTING.md). # IMPORTANT Aetheria shows a privacy notice on first launch before making any external connections. Analytics are fully optional and can be disabled anytime. ### Privacy & License The mod is source-available under the Aetheria Mod License v1.0 (AML-1.0). For full details on data collection, third-party infrastructure, and what the license means for you, see [ABOUT.md](https://github.com/aetheria-org/Aetheria/blob/main/docs/ABOUT.md). ## ✨ Credits This project would not be where it is today without the help of these amazing people. **Contributors and Maintainers** [Internet Protocol](https://github.com/protocol-8) [Whispering](https://github.com/ginafro1) **Discord Maintainer** [Hooman](https://github.com/mxhooman) > You can find credits and project information for Aetheria here: [aetheria-org.github.io](https://aetheria-org.github.io)
